parameters.query: UPDATE circuit_breaker_state SET state = 'half-open', half_open_at = NOW(), success_count = 0 WHERE service_id = $1::text RETURNING *;

-- Record success/failure for circuit breaker
WITH current_state AS (
  SELECT * FROM circuit_breaker_state WHERE service_id = $1::text
),
update_result AS (
  UPDATE circuit_breaker_state
  SET 
    failure_count = CASE 
      WHEN $2::text = 'success' THEN 0
      ELSE failure_count + 1
    END,
    success_count = CASE 
      WHEN $2::text = 'success' THEN 
        CASE WHEN state = 'half-open' THEN success_count + 1 ELSE 1 END
      ELSE 0
    END,
    state = CASE 
      WHEN $2::text = 'failure' AND failure_count + 1 >= failure_threshold THEN 'open'
      WHEN $2::text = 'success' AND state = 'half-open' AND success_count + 1 >= success_threshold THEN 'closed'
      WHEN $2::text = 'success' AND state = 'open' THEN 'closed'
      ELSE state
    END,
    opened_at = CASE 
      WHEN $2::text = 'failure' AND state = 'closed' AND failure_count + 1 >= failure_threshold THEN NOW()
      ELSE opened_at
    END,
    last_failure_at = CASE WHEN $2::text = 'failure' THEN NOW() ELSE last_failure_at END,
    last_success_at = CASE WHEN $2::text = 'success' THEN NOW() ELSE last_success_at END,
    last_error_message = CASE WHEN $2::text = 'failure' THEN 'api_error' ELSE last_error_message END
  WHERE service_id = $1::text
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT * FROM update_result;
